title: Declared analysis A
description: Normative-but-provisional reference model (R4). The explicit, versionable index of ground truth (Decision 0001). A change to any component yields a new version. R4 DECLARATION CONTRACT (D1): every constitutive component must be DECLARED — either as a nonempty value or as an explicit typed disposition object {"disposition": "not_applicable" | "unspecified_with_reason", "reason": "..."}. Silence is no longer a legal declaration. The compact form (analysis_id + version alone) is admissible ONLY when a resolvable 'inherits_from' parent analysis reference is present; the parent supplies the undeclared components and the cross-record layer checks that the parent actually resolves.

disposition.description: explicit typed disposition standing in for a D1 component

then.description: full D1 declaration contract: with no inherited parent, every constitutive component must carry a nonempty value or a typed disposition

inherits_from.description: parent analysis whose declarations this analysis inherits; must resolve to a declared analysis in the bundle (cross-record check)

governance_boundary.description: the governance authority whose requirements parameterize RequiredBy for this analysis

repertoire_ref.description: identifier of the active ortheme repertoire O_A

domain_ref.description: identifier of the active occurrence domain M_A. D2 (R4 independent review): deliberately NOT constitutive — Decision 0001's component list (boundary, task, repertoires, loss, hard constraints, horizon, tolerance, representation family, merger family, governance boundary) does not include the domain, because the activated domain M_A is INDUCED by the declared boundary and repertoires rather than independently chosen; this field is an optional explicit pointer, not a constitutive component.

policy_class.description: . D2 (R4 independent review): deliberately NOT constitutive — conduct policy lives at the governance layer (episode policy + governance_boundary component), not inside the analysis index; this optional field only labels a policy family for cross-analysis comparison.

axes.description: factorized profile axes with exclusivity markings and cross-axis constraints (Definition 10)
